Title: Osney Bridge diversion
Description: Towpath closed about 150 yards upstream, diversion via Abbey Road and Botley Road

Title: Marsh Lock footbridge closure
Description: Footbridge closed for safety, diversion via A4155 pavements, ~3 miles, may extend beyond Jan 2026

Title: Sandford Footbridge closure
Description: Unsafe footbridge closed upstream of Sandford Lock, diversion via NCN 5

Title: Abingdon Weir walkway closure
Description: Walkway across weir closed due to corrosion, rerouted via town centre, reopens at low water levels

Title: Temple Footbridge closure
Description: Environment Agency closed for safety. Divert via Bisham Abbey and minor roads to Marlow

Title: Runnymede Bridge 142 closure
Description: Footbridge closed, diversion via A308 pavements, extended to 2027

Title: Bell Weir Lock refurbishment
Description: Thames Path diverted at Runnymede Pleasure Ground during refurbishment works April 2026-Autumn 2027

Title: Streatley-Goring towpath diversion
Description: Path reopened after resurfacing March 2026, previously diverted

Title: Penton Hook Island closure
Description: No access to island due to diseased trees, Thames Path unaffected

Title: Ten Foot Bridge closure
Description: Structurally unsafe, closed March 2024, full specialist survey completed pending resolution

Title: Brentford Grand Union Canal disruption
Description: Left bank path blocked during redevelopment, parts now open via alternative routes through canal

Title: Benson Weir walkway reopened
Description: Footbridge reopened April 1, 2026 after 3+ years closed for repairs, diversion removed
